race.comment: SHOW COUNTY (5) struggled to see the 1300m out at his second run back with a fading eighth over 1300m at Rosehill in Midway class. This looks more to his liking and can return to form quickly. ZALE (3) holding his form this campaign and had genuine excuses when snagged back from the awkward gate to finish eighth over 1200m at Wyong in BM72 grade. Can hold a forward position today and best form is good enough to take this out. STARINION (10) good win two-back at Kembla, then had to work hard from the wide gate with a tiring ninth over 1300m at Canberra in C2 class. Drops sharply in weight with the 3kg claim and not to be underestimated. PUERTO BANUS (2) three runs back have had merit and primed for this from the inside draw. Key jockey change and represents good each way value. The chances don't end there.
